claims: 1. A solid electrolyte, comprising: a lithium element; a sulfur element; a phosphorous element; and a halogen element, wherein the solid electrolyte does not comprise an amorphous P 2 S 6 4− structure and has diffraction peaks at around 2θ=20.2° and 23.6° in an X-ray diffraction pattern using a CuKα ray.
